notes: Page-number pagination via 'page' param. Each page returns up to 10 news results. Response echoes 'num_pages' (stop when page >= num_pages). Distinct from realtime-news-data: this is a query-based Google News SEARCH endpoint (single /search) with time_period / custom date range / sort_by / safe filters; results live at data.news (with an optional data.top_stories cluster). rapidapi_host is best-effort (verify on the RapidAPI listing).
